What's going on everyone? Welcome to the Abandoned Hope sale. This is the week three sale or week two sale depending on you know whatever your front end program is but it's the halfway point sale. So this is where you're going to be meeting with them halfway through to close them on the next thing. The reason we do this halfway through is that usually this is when people's excitement is the highest, their engagement is the highest and they've had enough to taste of the program that they should be able to make a decision about staying. So we want to maximize our selling opportunities and do this halfway point rather than trying to do it at the end when they are emotionally done. So heat point here, you have to make sure that you plan these so that you are doing them at the halfway point. All right so note number one before you begin these Abandoned Hope sales, there are Abandoned Hope sales examples in the sales training. They're not in this section and that is because I kind of wanted to keep all the sales stuff together. So if you want examples and recordings of that you can go to the sales module. Those are not of us, those are just Jim owners who entered or submitted those recordings to help other Jim owners. Okay second note, make sure that you have their payment info ready and new contracts printed meaning you should have their initial contract out so that you have their payment info right there so that you can transcribe it onto a new contract and get their signature on the spot. You don't want to delay the sale of big sales mentor of mine used to say TKAD which is Time Kills All Deals and so for that reason you want to make sure that you can close the deal in that moment. Couple things before we get going, first off you have to come in with the mindset of there are no obstacles. The pitch that we were giving them is cheaper than what they are currently paying for. Their spouse already knows that they've made decisions to get healthy so there's no reason that they're trying to think about it. They have all the information that they would possibly need. They just worked out for the last three weeks. They know what they need to do. They know all the they have all the info they need. Three more weeks of workouts is not going to tell them anything and so you need to explain that to them so that they can confront the decision to be healthy. Lost for the same money. Basically we're saying listen we're going to give you a win here and I'll get into that in a moment but essentially the choice here is you can either continue at your own risk or we can make this a win automatically and we can commit to being healthy for good right so it's kind of a it should be a no-brainer from an offer standpoint. Third is that make sure that you have the up-to-date credit card. I'm resaying this because people sometimes still forget so make sure that you have updated credit card info in this part already for each of them to sign. Okay so these are just kind of some benchmark stats some ideas that you should know going into this close. clients at this point they should have got an exceptional service so there's no reason that you should feel worried about it all right they want to stay they want to get healthy you provide health so don't worry about it the next thing that they need is to continue doing it which you know and they know so there's no reason for them not to sign up and at a cheaper rate okay so you should expect 70 before this and removing accountability and it all comes crumbling down so people are like well maybe I'll be able to do it on my own it's like let's be really you did this for the last five days a coach for my business right like everyone has a coach Michael Jordan has a coach so thinking that you don't need to coach is silly and powerful okay um you really do need to come from a place of compassion because genuinely you should feel like if they do not sign up in this instance you are failing them really because they need your help to make a decision that they do not yet know how to make for themselves and you're you're teaching them how to prioritize themselves and teaching them what it what it means to be coached so that they can be successful and they're probably seeing more success now that they've had in a very long time instead of believe that that they're going to get what they want without you is very unrealistic because the reality is they're not going to go to anywhere else they're going to go back to the couch they're going to go back to Netflix they're going to go back to doing everything else they were doing before all right and you have history on your want to paint that picture for them you don't want to be a dick but you want to be very clear like let's confront this like what are the alternatives you have if you don't have any right right you need to stay here this obviously working for you so like let's keep going and remember this is a mandatory meeting um when you're sending out your communications um you're going to want to make it that way because people have some weird psychological thing with mandatory things they always attend them because since we were little kids when it said mandatory we had to do it so it is a mandatory meeting um and uh I just want you to know that the likelihood that you sell these people is going to be directly proportional to the six to the volume of outreach and the quality of the service they received at this point so make your job easier by doing a good job right like if you're if you've been crushing it and checking in on them and caring for them and your team has been upbeat and acknowledged them by name and they went to an event with your team like of course they're going to stay it's going to be a no-brainer you're not going to have to get into a really confrontational sale that you're not only going to give them what they uh they're doing right now and you give it for less but you're also on top of that you're going to stack the alternate play so whatever play you didn't use on the front end you're going to use on the back end so it's like if you did the 42 day detox first you're going to use a six week challenge and you're going to position it as the next step
